UvpBox.title: About JOYSHOT
UvpBox.description: JoyShot is a platform for on the go photography bookings across Taiwan, collaborating with over a hundred Taiwanese photographers to offer online booking services for on the go photography. Suitable for event documentation, travel captures, stylish street photography, business event, or any memorable moments. Convenient and efficient for photographer searching, selection, booking, payment, and photo download online. Capturing memories that makes your journey more valueable! Everyone keeps in the frame at the precious moments!
UvpBox.slogan1: Affordable and reasonable shooting fee, hourly charge
UvpBox.slogan2: Acceptable for minimum 1 hour shooting, available booking 3 days in advance
UvpBox.slogan3: Online select up to hundred local photgraphers
UvpBox.slogan4: Download all unedited photos within 24 hours

PrivacyPolicy.title: Privacy policy
PrivacyPolicy.content:
Welcome to JoyShot, the full-service photography booking platform in Taiwan. In order to ensure that you may use the information and services of the Website free of privacy concern, we hereby outline the privacy policy to safeguard your rights. Please read the following content carefully:

1. Scope of Privacy Policy:

This privacy policy governs how we handle the personal identification information when you use our website services. It does not apply to external websites linked from our site or to individuals not directly managed or commissioned by us.

2. Collection, Processing, and Use of Personal Data:

  • When you visit or utilize our website services, we may request necessary personal information based on the nature of the service. We will process and use your personal data within the scope of the specific purpose, and will not utilize it for other purposes without your written consent.
  • We retain information provided by you, such as name, email address, contact details, and usage times, when you engage in interactive features like service mailboxes or surveys.
  • During general browsing, our servers automatically record relevant behaviors for internal reference, including IP addresses, browsing times, browser types, and browsing/click data. This information is kept strictly confidential and not disclosed externally.
  • We conduct statistical analysis on collected survey content to improve service accuracy. Any statistical data or explanatory texts derived from the analysis may be disclosed as needed, but will not involve specific individual data.
  • You may request corrections or deletions of any incorrect or incomplete personal data collected by our website at any time.

3. Data Protection:

  • Our website servers are equipped with relevant information security equipment and necessary security measures such as firewalls and antivirus systems to protect both the website and your personal data. Only authorized personnel are allowed access to your personal information, and they are bound by confidentiality agreements. Any breach of confidentiality obligations will result in legal consequences.
  • When it is necessary to entrust other units to provide services due to business needs, we strictly require them to comply with confidentiality obligations and conduct necessary inspection procedures to ensure compliance.

4. External Links:

Our website provides links to other websites. By clicking on these links, you may access other websites whose privacy policies do not apply to ours. You must refer to the privacy policies of the respective linked websites.

5. Sharing of Personal Data with Third Parties:

We will never provide, exchange, rent, or sell any of your personal data to other individuals, groups, private companies, or government agencies unless there is a legal basis or contractual obligation to do so.

Exceptions include, but are not limited to:

  • With your written consent.
  • As required by law.
  • To prevent risks to your life, body, freedom, or property.
  • Cooperation with government agencies or academic research institutions for statistical or academic research purposes in the public interest, where the data provided is processed or collected anonymously.
  • When your actions on the website violate the terms of service, or may harm or impede the rights of the website and other users, and disclosure of your personal data by the website management unit is necessary for identification, contact, or legal action.
  • To protect your interests.
  • When our website entrusts vendors to assist in collecting, processing, or using your personal data, we will supervise and manage them responsibly.

6. Use of Cookies:

To provide you with the best service, our website will place and access cookies on your computer. If you do not wish to accept cookies, you can set your browser's privacy level to high to reject cookie writing. However, this may result in some website functions not performing properly.

7.Revision of Privacy Policy:

This website's privacy policy will be revised as needed and the revised terms will be published on the website.

Service Provider: Joyshot Digital Inc.
